revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月十三]][[zh:七月十三]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 13|qq=July 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenmu|ja|天武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q335181}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|674|en|674|qid=Q30302|lt=674|1=674}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}}) – The daughter of {{ill|Katarin no Omimaro|ja|語臣猪麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katarin no Omimaro|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} was playing on the beach at Himemizaki near {{ill|Nakaumi|en|Nakaumi|qid=Q1077275|lt=Nakaumi|1=Nakaumi}}, when she was devoured by a huge crocodile.<ref>『Izumo Province 風土記』意宇（おう）郡安来郷の条 [https://id.ndl.go.jp/bib/000007276116 国立国会図書館オンライン蔵書]</ref> * {{ill|Teigen|ja|貞元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigen|1=Q11634499|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11634499}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|976|en|976|qid=Q23782|lt=976|1=976}} {{ill|August 11|en|August 11|qid=Q2778|lt=August 11|1=August 11}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Ten'en|en|Ten'en|qid=Q1327245|lt=Tennen|1=Ten'en}} to {{ill|Teigen|ja|貞元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigen|1=Q11634499|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11634499}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Manju (era)|en|Manju (era)|qid=Q1194155|lt=Manju|1=Manju (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1024|en|1024|qid=Q19265|lt=1024|1=1024}} {{ill|August 19|en|August 19|qid=Q2829|lt=August 19|1=August 19}}) – For the sake of the historical edict {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei|ja|高志覚令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} to {{ill|Manju (era)|en|Manju (era)|qid=Q1194155|lt=Manju|1=Manju (era)}}. * {{ill|Ten'ei|en|Ten'ei|qid=Q1193915|lt=Tennen|1=Ten'ei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1110|en|1110|qid=Q19519|lt=1110|1=1110}} {{ill|July 31|en|July 31|qid=Q2715|lt=July 31|1=July 31}}) – Due to the appearance of a comet, the era name was changed from {{ill|Tennin (era)|en|Tennin (era)|qid=Q1193599|lt=Tennin|1=Tennin (era)}} to {{ill|Ten'ei|en|Ten'ei|qid=Q1193915|lt=Tennen|1=Ten'ei}}. * {{ill|Eikyū|ja|永久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eikyū|1=Eikyū (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16277931}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1113|en|1113|qid=Q19531|lt=1113|1=1113}} {{ill|August 25|en|August 25|qid=Q2819|lt=August 25|1=August 25}}) – Because of unusual phenomena, strange events, epidemics, and warfare, the era name was changed from {{ill|Ten'ei|en|Ten'ei|qid=Q1193915|lt=Tennen|1=Ten'ei}} to {{ill|Eikyū|ja|永久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eikyū|1=Eikyū (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16277931}}. * {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|qid=Q1195428|lt=Jōkyū|1=Jōkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1221|en|1221|qid=Q5393|lt=1221|1=1221}} {{ill|August 2|en|August 2|qid=Q2785|lt=August 2|1=August 2}}) – After the defeat in the 【Jōkyū War】, {{ill|Emperor Go-Toba|ja|後鳥羽上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Toba|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後鳥羽天皇|1=Emperor Go-Toba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q316658}} was exiled to {{ill|Oki Province|ja|隠岐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oki Province|1=Oki Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11659029}}. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1590|en|1590|qid=Q6764|lt=1590|1=1590}} {{ill|August 12|en|August 12|qid=Q2777|lt=August 12|1=August 12}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} granted Kanto to eight provinces to {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}. * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}}) – Following the accession of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|en|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|qid=Q320229|lt=Go-Mizuo Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Mizunoo}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} to {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1847|en|1847|qid=Q7644|lt=1847|1=1847}} {{ill|August 23|en|August 23|qid=Q2821|lt=August 23|1=August 23}}) – {{ill|Mori Arinori|en|Mori Arinori|qid=Q1194472|lt=Mori Arirei|1=Mori Arinori}}, a diplomat and the first {{ill|Minister of Education|ja|文部大臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minister of Education|1=Minister of Education|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q14917211}} (died {{ill|1889|en|1889|qid=Q7831|lt=1889|1=1889}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Daiji|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji|1=Q10936305|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10936305}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1128|en|1128|qid=Q23746|lt=1128|1=1128}} {{ill|August 10|en|August 10|qid=Q2779|lt=August 10|1=August 10}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Kiyohira|en|Fujiwara no Kiyohira|qid=Q5360232|lt=Fujiwara Kiyohira|1=Fujiwara no Kiyohira}}, a powerful local chieftain in Mutsu who established {{ill|Chūson-ji|en|Chūson-ji|qid=Q2660144|lt=Chūson-ji|1=Chūson-ji}} (born {{ill|1056|en|1056|qid=Q19375|lt=1056|1=1056}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1624|en|1624|qid=Q6821|lt=1624|1=1624}} {{ill|August 26|en|August 26|qid=Q2820|lt=August 26|1=August 26}}) – {{ill|Fukushima Masanori|en|Fukushima Masanori|qid=Q1194995|lt=Fukushima Masanori|1=Fukushima Masanori}}, a daimyō active from the Sengoku period to early Edo, noted as the leading figure of the “Seven Spears of Shizugatake” (born {{ill|1561|en|1561|qid=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}}) – {{ill|Tsubaki Chinzan|en|Tsubaki Chinzan|qid=Q3541614|lt=Tsubaki Tsubakiyama|1=Tsubaki Chinzan}}, a painter (born {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Urabonkai|ja|盆迎え火|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabonkai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|12|7|14|6|13|8|7|0713|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月十三]]

[[cdo:7 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:July 13 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 7월 13일]] [[ja:7月13日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:七月十三]]
[[ar:July 13 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月十三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月十三]] {{wikidata link|Q839878}} [[Category:Days 13 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar July]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
